services.title: Visual Systems & Brand Identity
services.description: Editorial-quality AI-generated imagery for brands that cannot compromise on aesthetics. Product visuals, campaign imagery and catalogue production — without traditional photoshoot costs. Built on the Physical Fidelity Protocol™: every published visual is checked directly against the physical piece it represents. The image the customer sees is the object they receive.

services.title: Brand Intelligence
services.description: Your brand has a point of view. We build the narrative framework, visual language and operational structure that keeps it distinctively yours — before any tool is allowed to touch it.
services.tooltip: measured by comparing key dimensions and material properties between the physical piece and its AI-generated representation.

services.title: Strategic AI Integration
services.description: You don't need more AI tools. You need to know which ones actually serve your business — and how to use them without losing your voice. We offer this primarily to brands we already work with: it's the support layer behind the systems above, not a standalone product.
